div.t-if: report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Purchase Order','Sales','Purchase RFQ','Invoice']

h6.t-if: report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and not res_config.show_reg_no
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

div.t-attf-class: #{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}
#{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}
#{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}

div.t: All items couldn't be shipped, the following items will be shipped as soon as they become available.

section.t-if: report_name not in ['Delivery Note', 'Picking Slip','Purchase RFQ']

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-5 offset-3' if report_name in ['Invoice','Bill'] else 'col-5 offset-7'}

table.t-attf-class: table table-sm no-inner-border #{'table-bordered' if not res_config.hide_table_border else ''}

tr.t-if: report_name in ['Sales','Purchase Order','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Progressive Quotation'] and res_config.display_total_amount

div.span: Please use following communication for your payment INV/2021/01/0001

div.t-if: report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Purchase Order','Sales','Purchase RFQ','Invoice']

h6.t-if: report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and not res_config.show_reg_no
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

div.t-attf-class: #{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}
#{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}
#{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}

div.t: All items couldn't be shipped, the following items will be shipped as soon as they become available.

section.t-if: report_name not in ['Delivery Note', 'Picking Slip','Purchase RFQ']

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-5 offset-3' if report_name in ['Invoice','Bill'] else 'col-5 offset-7'}

table.t-attf-class: table table-sm no-inner-border #{'table-bordered' if not res_config.hide_table_border else ''}

tr.t-if: report_name in ['Sales','Purchase Order','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Progressive Quotation'] and res_config.display_total_amount

div.p:
1. Payment is due within 30 days from the invoice date, unless otherwise agreed in writing.
2. Goods once sold will not be taken back or exchanged.

table.t-if: report_name in ['Invoice'] and res_config.show_aging_analysis and res_config.aging_type == 'days'
report_name in ['Invoice'] and res_config.show_aging_analysis and res_config.aging_type == 'months'

tr.th: AGING ANALYSIS REPORT AT 20/08/2025 IN SGD

div.t-if: res_config.paynow_qr_code and report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and not res_config.show_address_table

p.strong:
Kindly update us your new contact details if any.
You may email it to account@gmail.com

h3.t-if: report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and not res_config.show_reg_no
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

div.t-if: report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Purchase Order','Sales','Purchase RFQ','Invoice']

h6.t-if: report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and not res_config.show_reg_no
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
report_name in ['Invoice','Progressive Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
report_name in ['Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and not res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'
report_name in ['Invoice'] and res_config.show_reg_no and res_config.reg_no_type == 'gst'

div.t-attf-class: #{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}
#{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}
#{'ks_details' if report_name in ['Sales','Picking Slip','Purchase Order'] else 'row ks_details'}

div.t: All items couldn't be shipped, the following items will be shipped as soon as they become available.

section.t-if: report_name not in ['Delivery Note', 'Picking Slip','Purchase RFQ']

div.t-attf-class: #{'col-5 offset-3' if report_name in ['Invoice','Bill'] else 'col-5 offset-7'}

table.t-attf-class: table table-sm no-inner-border #{'table-bordered' if not res_config.hide_table_border else ''}

tr.t-if: report_name in ['Sales','Purchase Order','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Progressive Quotation'] and res_config.display_total_amount

div.span: Please use following communication for your payment INV/2021/01/0001

th.t-if: res_config.show_item and report_name not in ['Delivery Note','Picking Slip','Payment Receipts']
res_config.ks_product_desc and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
res_config.ks_product_desc and report_name in ['Delivery Note','Picking Slip']

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size text-left
#{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size text-left
th.t-if: report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Picking Slip','Delivery Note'] and res_config.show_uom

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size text-left

th.t-if: report_name not in ['Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Payment Receipts','Purchase RFQ']
res_config.ks_discount and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Purchase Order']
res_config.ks_show_taxes and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Purchase Order','Purchase RFQ']
report_name not in ['Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Payment Receipts','Purchase RFQ']

td.t-if: res_config.show_item and not res_config.ks_show_space and report_name not in ['Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
res_config.show_item and res_config.ks_show_space and report_name not in ['Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
res_config.ks_product_desc and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip'] and res_config.show_uom
report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Purchase RFQ']
res_config.ks_discount and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Purchase Order']
res_config.ks_show_taxes and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Purchase Order','Purchase RFQ']
report_name not in ['Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Payment Receipts','Purchase RFQ']

th.t-if: res_config.show_item and report_name not in ['Picking Slip','Payment Receipts']
res_config.ks_product_desc and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
res_config.show_image and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip','Invoice']
res_config.ks_product_desc and report_name in ['Delivery Note','Picking Slip']

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size text-center
th.t-if: res_config.show_quantity and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Picking Slip']

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size text-center
th.t-if: res_config.show_uom and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Picking Slip','Delivery Note']

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size

th.t-if: res_config.show_price and report_name not in ['Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Payment Receipts','Purchase RFQ']
res_config.ks_discount and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Purchase Order']
res_config.ks_show_taxes and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Progressive Quotation','Purchase Order','Purchase RFQ']
report_name not in ['Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Payment Receipts','Purchase RFQ']

td.t-if: res_config.show_item and not res_config.ks_show_space and report_name not in ['Picking Slip']
res_config.show_item and res_config.ks_show_space and report_name not in ['Picking Slip']
res_config.ks_product_desc and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note']
res_config.show_quantity and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip']
report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Delivery Note','Picking Slip'] and res_config.show_uom
res_config.show_price and report_name not in ['Payment Receipts','Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Purchase RFQ']
res_config.ks_discount and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Purchase Order']
res_config.ks_show_taxes and report_name in ['Sales','Invoice','Bill','Progressive Invoice','Progressive Quotation','Purchase Order','Purchase RFQ']
report_name not in ['Picking Slip', 'Delivery Note','Payment Receipts','Purchase RFQ']

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size text-center

t.t-if: res_config.company_id.street2 or res_config.company_id.city or res_config.company_id.zip or res_config.company_id.state_id or res_config.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
res_config.company_id.city or res_config.company_id.zip or res_config.company_id.state_id or res_config.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
res_config.company_id.zip or res_config.company_id.state_id or res_config.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

template.p:
Attn: Metro Group
116 Changi Road, #04-03 WIS@Changi Singapore 419718

Attn: Metro Group
Address: 116 Changi Road, #04-03 WIS@Changi, Singapore, 419718
